caption: A video news segment features footage of people gathered around a vehicle in an outdoor setting. Several men are visible, including one in a dark uniform and cap standing on the right and others in traditional Indian attire, such as Nehru jackets and skullcaps. On-screen graphics include a red banner at the bottom with the white text "RJD पर नीतीश कुमार का पलटवार" and a timestamp of "10:05 PM". A top banner reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The right side of the screen displays headshots of men labeled "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार" under the heading "मंत्री". The left side contains a headshot of a man identified as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". As the scene progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and a man in a dark sweater moves across the frame toward the center, interacting with the others. The news graphics remain consistent across the sequence.
